overrides.reason: 0019_lm2_data_layer.sql in the current repository already creates lm2_journeys.week_started_at and lm2_journeys.week_completed_at; replaying the historical 0021 ALTER statements against an empty database therefore conflicts even though the semantic schema effect is already present.
overrides.semanticEffect: Marks 0021 as semantically satisfied only when week_started_at and week_completed_at already exist from 0019; otherwise tooling must run the original migration.
